pi_items.source: Environment setup script (setup_moodle.sh line 323) creates course with shortname='BIO101' and fullname='Introduction to Biology'
Task description requires: 'Create a new Grouping named Lab Sections'; matches metadata and task requirements exactly
Task setup script (setup_task.sh line 50) creates group 'Monday Lab' in course BIO101; task description requires adding this existing group to grouping
Task setup script (setup_task.sh line 50) creates group 'Thursday Lab' in course BIO101; task description requires adding this existing group to grouping
Task description requires: 'Create a new Assignment named Lab Report 1'; matches metadata and task requirements exactly

privileged_info_summary: Environment setup creates a BIO101 course in the Science category. The BIO101 course pre-configures two groups: 'Monday Lab' and 'Thursday Lab'. The task requires the agent to create a 'Lab Sections' grouping and add both existing groups to it, then create a 'Lab Report 1' assignment and configure it to be restricted to the Lab Sections grouping with 'Separate groups' mode enabled.
